## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] Refactor

## Testing

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Not run, reason:

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept SDK and API concerns decoupled.
- [ ] I added or updated tests.
- [ ] I updated docs or examples for developer-facing changes.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, real API keys, or private trace data.
